task_completion.description: Import the background image into OpenToonz
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz interface is visible, and the 'room_bg.jpg' image is loaded into a column in the Xsheet/Timeline and visible in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: Create a red ball object in the scene
task_completion.visual_evidence: A red ball is drawn or imported into a new column/layer in OpenToonz and is visible in the viewer.

task_completion.description: Set frame 1 with the ball high in the air
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz timeline/Xsheet is on frame 1, and the red ball is positioned high up in the viewer relative to the background.

task_completion.description: Set frame 12 with the ball hitting the floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz timeline/Xsheet is on frame 12, and the red ball is positioned significantly lower, appearing to touch the floor area of the background.

task_completion.description: Set frame 24 with the ball bouncing back up
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz timeline/Xsheet is on frame 24, and the red ball is positioned higher up in the air compared to its position in frame 12.

task_completion.description: Configure output settings for PNG sequence in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Output Settings window in OpenToonz is open, showing the save path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/bouncing_ball/' (or similar valid path) and the file format set to PNG.

task_completion.description: Render at least 24 frames as a PNG sequence
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows a sequence of at least 24 PNG files (e.g., 0001.png to 0024.png) successfully created in the '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/bouncing_ball/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenToonz GUI to create the animation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with OpenToonz tools, Xsheet, and viewer. The agent must not use terminal scripts (e.g., Python, ImageMagick) to bypass the OpenToonz software.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely animated the ball rather than copying pre-made files
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of keyframes being set or drawings being manipulated in the OpenToonz timeline/Xsheet, rather than just moving existing PNG files into the output directory.

integrity.description: Background was included in the OpenToonz render
integrity.visual_evidence: The background image must be visible behind the red ball in the OpenToonz viewer during the animation process, ensuring it will be part of the final rendered PNGs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input background is located at '/home/ga/OpenToonz/inputs/room_bg.jpg'. The output must be a PNG sequence of at least 24 frames saved to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/bouncing_ball/'. The animation must feature a red ball. Keyframes are: Frame 1 (ball high), Frame 12 (ball hits floor, lower in the frame), and Frame 24 (ball bounces back up).
